description_long: This is a medium-sized, two-seat sofa upholstered in a textured, deep red fabric with a subtle diagonal weave pattern. The sofa features two large, loose back cushions and two seat cushions, all of which are uniform in size and shape, providing a plush and inviting appearance. The armrests are broad, slightly flared, and padded, rising to just above the seat height for comfortable support. The backrest is continuous and straight, matching the height of the armrests and offering a cohesive silhouette. The sofa's base is fully skirted, concealing any visible legs and giving it a grounded, solid look. This piece would be well-suited for placement in urban parks, public waiting areas, or residential sidewalks, offering a comfortable seating option in communal spaces.
description: A deep red, two-seat sofa with a textured fabric, broad padded armrests, and loose, uniform cushions. The base is skirted, giving it a solid, grounded appearance.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the two seat and back cushions, both armrests, and the inviting, plush seating area.
description_view_1: Rear-left view highlighting the continuous, straight backrest and the fully skirted base with no visible legs.
description_view_2: Rear-right view focusing on the sofa's solid back and the seamless upholstery wrapping around the structure.
description_view_3: Front-right view displaying the two loose cushions, both armrests, and the textured fabric pattern.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large, loose seat cushions and two matching loose back cushions, all uniform in size and shape, arranged side by side.
attribute_armrest_style: Broad, padded armrests that are slightly flared and rise just above seat height, with a straight, simple profile and no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Legs are not visible; the base is fully skirted, suggesting hidden or recessed support legs.
attribute_backrest_type: Continuous, straight backrest matching the armrest height, with no visible segmentation or tufting, and supporting two loose back cushions.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Textured fabric with a subtle diagonal weave pattern, solid deep red color, and no visible decorative stitching or tufting.
